name: com.wolfstaginteractive.convocore
description: ConvoCore is a Unity native dialogue framework for building the dialogue system your project deserves, in any genre, at any scale, while staying in its lane.

samples.description: A collection of sample assets demonstrating how to use ConvoCore.
Audio provider for FMOD Studio. Requires FMOD for Unity (https://www.fmod.com/docs/unity/welcome.html). After importing, add CONVOCORE_FMOD to Project Settings > Player > Scripting Define Symbols.

Audio provider for Audiokinetic Wwise. Requires the Wwise Unity Integration (https://www.audiokinetic.com/en/public-library/?source=Unity&id=index.html). After importing, add CONVOCORE_WWISE to Project Settings > Player > Scripting Define Symbols.
